# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

class ReportGenerator
{
    private PDO $pdo;

    public function __construct(PDO $pdo)
    {
        $this->pdo = $pdo;
    }

    public function generateReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports";
        $whereClauses = [];
        $parameters = [];
        $placeholderCounter = 0;

        if (!empty($filters['start_date']) && !empty($filters['end_date'])) {
            $whereClauses[] = "report_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
            $parameters[':start_date'] = $filters['start_date'];
            $parameters[':end_date'] = $filters['end_date'];
        }

        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            if (is_array($filters['status'])) {
                $statusPlaceholders = [];
                foreach ($filters['status'] as $status) {
                    $placeholder = ":status_" . $placeholderCounter++;
                    $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                    $parameters[$placeholder] = $status;
                }
                $whereClauses[] = "status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
            } else {
                $whereClauses[] = "status = :status_single";
                $parameters[':status_single'] = $filters['status'];
            }
        }

        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            if (is_array($filters['category'])) {
                $categoryPlaceholders = [];
                foreach ($filters['category'] as $category) {
                    $placeholder = ":category_" . $placeholderCounter++;
                    $categoryPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                    $parameters[$placeholder] = $category;
                }
                $whereClauses[] = "category IN (" . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
            } else {
                $whereClauses[] = "category = :category_single";
                $parameters[':category_single'] = $filters['category'];
            }
        }

        if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
            $sql .= " WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $whereClauses);
        }

        try {
            $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);

            foreach ($parameters as $paramName => $paramValue) {
                $type = PDO::PARAM_STR;
                if (is_int($paramValue)) {
                    $type = PDO::PARAM_INT;
                } elseif (is_bool($paramValue)) {
                    $type = PDO::PARAM_BOOL;
                } elseif (is_null($paramValue)) {
                    $type = PDO::PARAM_NULL;
                }
                $stmt->bindValue($paramName, $paramValue, $type);
            }

            $stmt->execute();

            return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

        } catch (PDOException $e) {
            error_log("Report generation error: " . $e->getMessage());
            throw new Exception("Error generating report: " . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}
